name: loam
description: Workflow skills for AI coding agents: goals, planning, specs, memory, checkpoints, and agent debates.

interface.shortDescription: Goal, planning, memory, and checkpoint skills for coding agents
interface.longDescription: Use loam to set verifiable goals, plan and execute work, research questions, and maintain persistent memory so sessions build on each other instead of starting from scratch.
defaultPrompt: Let's plan this feature before building it.
Turn this ambition into a verifiable goal.
Save what we learned this session to memory.
